message:
fix: Add --legacy-peer-deps to truth-scoring, verification-pipeline, and rollback-manager workflows

- Added --legacy-peer-deps flag to all npm ci commands
- Fixes TypeScript peer dependency conflicts (5.9.2 vs <5.9.0)
- Resolves failing workflow setups:
  * Truth Scoring Pipeline
  * Verification Pipeline
  * Rollback Manager

This ensures consistent dependency installation across all workflows.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

files.patch:
@@ -259,7 +259,7 @@ jobs:
 
           # Test if the target can build (strict error checking)
           echo "Installing dependencies..."
-          npm ci
+          npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
 
           echo "Testing build..."
           npm run build:ts

@@ -63,7 +63,7 @@ jobs:
           cache: 'npm'
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
 
       - name: Initialize truth scoring database
         run: |
@@ -107,7 +107,7 @@ jobs:
           cache: 'npm'
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
 
       - name: Download session config
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
@@ -218,7 +218,7 @@ jobs:

       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci

@@ -319,13 +319,13 @@ jobs:
           echo "⚡ Running baseline performance tests..."
           
           git checkout ${{ needs.truth-scoring-setup.outputs.baseline-ref }}
-          npm ci
+          npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
           
           # Run performance benchmarks for baseline
           timeout 300s npm run test:performance > truth-scoring-data/baseline-performance.log 2>&1 || true
           
           git checkout ${{ github.sha }}
-          npm ci
+          npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
 
       - name: Run current performance tests
         run: |

@@ -51,7 +51,7 @@ jobs:
           echo "cache-key=${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
 
       - name: Cache dependencies
         uses: actions/cache@v4

           key: ${{ needs.setup-verification.outputs.cache-key }}
 
       - name: Install dependencies
-        run: npm ci
+        run: npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
 
       - name: Security audit

       - name: Install dependencies
